name: Digital Culture and Data Analytics
descriptions: The Digital Culture and Data Analytics (DCDA) program prepares students to engage critically and creatively with digital technologies and data. Students choose from courses across multiple colleges spanning digital culture, data analytics, and multimedia authoring.

courses: Intro (Req'd English): ENGL 20813, WRIT 20303, WRIT 20323, or WRIT 20333
Coding: WRIT 20833, GEOG 30323, COSC 10603, or DCDA 20833
Multimedia Authoring: WRIT 40163, WRIT 40263, WRIT 40363, WRIT 40463, WRIT 40563, CRWT 30363, STCO 36403, or EDUC 50263
Capstone or Thesis: DCDA 40833 or DCDA 40003

electiveCourses.description: One Digital Culture elective (3 hrs) + One Data Analytics elective (3 hrs) + Four general electives from approved list (12 hrs)
